notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Manage your notifications and stay updated with the latest news and updates. Here you can view all your notifications and customize your notification preferences.

settings.title: Notification Settings
settings.subtitle: Here you can customize your notification preferences. Choose how you want to receive updates and stay informed about important events and updates.

email.label: Email Notifications
email.details: By enabling email notifications, you will automatically receive updates on your company email associated with the platform.

telegram.label: Telegram Notifications
telegram.details: By enabling Telegram notifications, you will automatically receive notifications on your Telegram account. Simply enter your Telegram chat ID to start receiving notifications.

chatId.label: Telegram Chat ID
chatId.hint: You can get your chat ID using @get_id_bot on Telegram
chatId.error: Please enter a valid Telegram chat ID.

ntfy.label: NTFY App Notifications
ntfy.description: How can I subscribe to receive push notifications on my phone through the NTFY app?

toggle.label: ntfy Notifications
toggle.description: Receive real-time notifications on your phone via the ntfy app.
toggle.details: By enabling ntfy notifications, you will receive instant updates on your phone for important events and updates. To get started, simply subscribe to the provided notification topic using the ntfy app, and you'll be notified immediately whenever there are relevant updates or changes in your projects.

steps.step1: Download NTFY app from App Store or Google Play <link>here</link>
steps.step2: Click the '+' button to add a new subscription
steps.step3: Choose 'Set another server' and enter this server URL: <url></url>
steps.step4: Copy and paste your notification topic below

generalPrinciples.title: General Principles
generalPrinciples.description: Tawer Digital Group (TDG) establishes the following internal rules to ensure discipline, transparency, productivity, and organizational clarity.
generalPrinciples.important: All employees are required to read, understand, and strictly comply with these rules.

workMode.title: Work Mode Policy (Remote & On-Site)
workMode.mandatory: Each employee is entitled to ONE (1) remote working day per week.
workMode.details: All other working days must be ON-SITE.
workMode.note: The remote day must be planned and approved according to team needs.
workMode.warning: Unauthorized remote work is not permitted.

workingHours.title: Working Hours
workingHours.mandatory: Respect of working hours and punctuality is mandatory.

platform.title: Management Platform (Mandatory)
platform.description: TDG uses an internal management platform to track attendance, working time, and breaks.
platform.critical: Platform usage is MANDATORY for all employees
platform.checkIn: Check-in is required at the start of work
platform.checkOut: Check-out is required at the end of work
platform.breakRules: Any break taken during working hours MUST be recorded
platform.warning: Failure to comply with platform usage rules may lead to administrative or disciplinary action.

paidLeave.title: Paid Annual Leave
paidLeave.mandatory: Employees earn 1.5 days of paid leave per month
paidLeave.annual: Annual total: 1.5 × 12 = 18 paid leave days per year
paidLeave.planning: Leave planning must respect team organization and business needs

sickLeave.title: Sick Leave
sickLeave.requirement: A medical certificate must be provided within 48 hours
sickLeave.verification: The company may request medical verification if necessary

specialLeave.title: Special Paid Leave (Family Events)
specialLeave.birth: 2 working days: Birth of a child
specialLeave.circumcision: 1 working day: Circumcision or marriage of an employee's child

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.mandatory: All employees of Tawer Digital Group must comply with these rules.
compliance.warning: Any violation may result in disciplinary measures in accordance with company policy and applicable labor laws.
